sections.paragraph:
- Original: Φαραώ

- Transliteration: Pharao

- Phonetic: far-ah-o'

- Definition: Pharaoh = "his nakedness"

1. was a common title of the native kings of Egypt

- Origin: of foreign origin H6547

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: Of foreign origin [H6547]; Pharao (that is Pharoh) an Egyptian king: - Pharaoh.
